message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[{\"symbol\": 123, \"price\": 10.0, \"volatility\": null, \"correlated_with\": null}, {\"price\": 5.0}, {\"symbol\": \"X\", \"price\": 1.0, \"volatility\": 0.9, \"correlated_with\": [\"123\", null]}]","0.01","null","null"],"focus":"Missing and null fields, non-string symbol conversion, and behavior when transaction costs are disabled (None). Tests defaults and .get()/or [] handling."},{"input_lines":["[{\"symbol\": \"A\", \"price\": 100.0, \"volatility\": 0.1, \"correlated_with\": [\"B\", \"C\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"B\", \"price\": 50.0, \"volatility\": 0.12, \"correlated_with\": [\"A\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"C\", \"price\": 20.0, \"volatility\": 0.2, \"correlated_with\": [\"A\"]}]","0.001","0.75","1.0"],"focus":"Tight risk tolerance with very limited transaction cost budget to exercise budget checks, backtracking, and selection when only one unit can be afforded."},{"input_lines":["[{\"symbol\": \"S1\", \"price\": 10.0, \"volatility\": 0.0, \"correlated_with\": [\"S2\", \"S3\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"S2\", \"price\": 20.0, \"volatility\": 0.15, \"correlated_with\": [\"S1\", \"S1\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"S3\", \"price\": 5.0, \"volatility\": 0.25, \"correlated_with\": [\"S4\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"S4\", \"price\": 8.0, \"volatility\": 0.5, \"correlated_with\": [\"S3\", \"MISSING\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"S5\", \"price\": 2.0, \"volatility\": 0.05, \"correlated_with\": []}, {\"symbol\": \"S6\", \"price\": 1.0, \"volatility\": 0.02, \"correlated_with\": [\"S7\"]}, {\"symbol\": \"S7\", \"price\": 3.0, \"volatility\": 0.07, \"correlated_with\": [\"S6\"]}]","0.25","1.0","10.0"],"focus":"Odd number of stocks (forces next power-of-two segment tree), duplicate correlations, missing referenced symbols, and moderate budget to exercise rebalance and HHI/concentration effects."}]}
